name: Red Robin Gourmet Burgers, Inc.
description: Red Robin Gourmet Burgers, Inc. is an American casual dining restaurant chain founded in 1969, headquartered in Greenwood Village, Colorado. The company is best known for its wide variety of gourmet burgers, including its signature Red Robin Gourmet Cheeseburger, as well as an extensive menu featuring appetizers, salads, soups, and milkshakes. Operating hundreds of locations across the United States and Canada, Red Robin emphasizes a family-friendly atmosphere and is particularly recognized for its "Bottomless" sides and beverage offerings, providing a unique dining experience centered around high-quality, customizable burgers and attentive service.
